sprint: Noah-MP S6a — integrate 6 ported components into a working prognostic land surface

merge.result: clean (zero conflicts; disjoint component files; energy-fix supersets types.py/tables.py/noahmp_state.py)

precip_heat: ported faithful to module_sf_noahmplsm.F ATM(:1083-1252 opt_snf=1) + PRECIP_HEAT(:1362-1556): PAHV/PAHG/PAHB (real, default-0 no-precip), canopy interception FWET/CANLIQ/CANICE, QINTR/QDRIP/QTHRO, QRAIN/QSNOW/SNOWHIN/BDFALL; +/-20 W/m2 PAH clamp; FVEG renormalisation
driver: noah_mp_step wired in WRF NOAHMP_SFLX order: PHENOLOGY(S5) -> PRECIP_HEAT -> RADIATION+ENERGY(S1; ENERGY calls S2 TSNOSOI STC update internally) -> PHASECHANGE(S2; produces IMELT/QMELT) -> WATER(S4) -> SNOW(S3) -> ERROR/closure; EnergyParams/TwoStreamParams gathered from static.parameters by ivgtyp/isltyp (vectorised, no host transfer)
coupler: noahmp_surface_adapter LAND-MASKED: sfclay runs all columns + SEEDS CH/CM; Noah-MP re-derives authoritative land-tile CH/CM; where(is_land,...) blends HFX/LH/QFX/TSK/ZNT; kinematic handles rebuilt from blended flux for MYNN bottom BC; ocean path byte-unchanged (verified); operational_mode.py NOT edited (perf-sidecar owns it)
checkpoint_v2: FORMAT_VERSION 1->2 + noahmp_land_state + noahmp_format(scope_options); v1 readable -> land=None cold-init; exact field-order guard fails closed; bit-identical land round-trip + restart-continuity (save->load->step bit-identical)

flag_reconciliation.fveg_dveg4: SHDMAX(S5) vs SHDFAC(S0b) resolved DEFINITIVELY by pristine WRF module_sf_noahmplsm.F:864 (dveg=4 -> FVEG=SHDMAX) + module_sf_noahmpdrv.F:752-753 (FVEG=VEGFRA/100, FVGMAX=VEGMAX/100). SHDMAX is a 2-D wrfinput field, NOT an MPTABLE param: added NoahMPStatic.shdmax/shdfac (additive, default-None backward-compatible); phenology.py + water_hydro.py now read static.shdmax. Verified: every savepoint column's wrf.phen_out.fveg == shdmax
flag_reconciliation.phenology_table_gather: phenology now gathers per-category laim/saim/hvt/hvb by ivgtyp (real S0b table layout (nveg+1,12)/(nveg+1,)); still accepts pre-gathered tables (unit oracle)
flag_reconciliation.water_slope: SLOPE gathered by SLOPETYP=1 from the (nslope+1,) table (was broadcast-as-scalar)
flag_reconciliation.s2_phasechange: wired into driver as the IMELT/QMELT source for S3 snow bookkeeping
flag_reconciliation.s3_qsnow_snowhin: QSNOW/SNOWHIN/BDFALL now sourced from PRECIP_HEAT; IMELT/QMELT from PHASECHANGE

a_per_component_postmerge_real_wrf.water_S4: conservation 11/11 PASS (resid<1e-6mm) + parity 8/11; daytime soil-evap parity validated in coupled path (dump lacks per-layer BTRANI) — honest limitation, not masked (NEW gate)

gates.b_integrated_step: 11/11 Canary land columns; HFX/GRDFLX/TSK/LH match WRF driver mapping; ENERGY ERRENG closure ~1e-13; all carry + fluxes finite
gates.c_idealized_bit_identical: warm-bubble + Straka density-current dycore close gate 2/2 PASS on GPU (verdict=PASS); diagnostics unchanged to ~13 sig figs (GPU FP-reduction noise only); Noah-MP provably absent from the idealized path (zero imports) -> STRICT NO-OP
gates.d_restart_roundtrip: checkpoint v2 land save->load->step BIT-IDENTICAL (5/5 tests); v1 backward-read -> land=None; field-order guard fails closed

file_ownership: src/gpuwrf/physics/noahmp/* + noahmp_coupler.py + runtime/checkpoint.py(v2) + contracts/noahmp_state.py(additive shdmax/shdfac). Did NOT touch dycore acoustic/advection, perf files, publish/paper, v0.1.0 release, live-nesting.
known_limitations: soil_thermo solve has a latent broadcast collision when nx==NSOIL(4); operational grids are nx>>4 and gates use nx in {5,11} -> not an integration blocker, flagged for S4 robustness pass
water standalone parity 8/11 (daytime high-soil-evap columns need per-layer BTRANI which the dump omits; coupled integration gate covers them, 11/11)
pre-existing UNRELATED stale test: tests/test_m7_restart_checkpoint_roundtrip.py asserts len(State.__slots__)==47 but base State has 53 (fails on base 0c3d90a too; not touched)
verdict: S6A_INTEGRATION_COMPLETE — prognostic Noah-MP is WRF-faithful (5 components real-WRF parity + integrated driver-mapping + closure) and a STRICT idealized no-op; restart round-trip bit-identical. d02/d03 + TOST deferred to S6b per task.
